message:
fix(fp-types): check identity cast before missing-value branch in cast_scalar_owned

The previous order checked is_missing() first, which always allocates a
new Scalar::missing_for_dtype even when from == target (the value is
already the right type). Reordering so the identity-cast early-return
fires first avoids that unnecessary allocation and is semantically
correct — a missing value of the correct dtype should be returned as-is.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
